title: BlockPlacerBreakerFeaturePatch
description: A patch to Block Breaker & Block Placer adding small tweaks I think are important
body:
A small patch to [Block Breaker & Block Placer](https://modrinth.com/mod/breakerplacer/) that adds the following features:
* Tools used in the breaker have their durability consumed
* When shift-clicking from a player inventory into a Block Breaker, Tools will attempt to go into the tool slot before entering the main breaker inventory
* Adds compatability with [FabricaeExNihilo](https://github.com/LordDeatHunter/FabricaeExNihilo/tree/1.21), making blocks mined by the breaker drop their hammered loot instead of their normal loot
* Makes the breaker have configurable sidedness? I don't know how else to explain it.
